---
title: "Carmel"
section: "jurisdictions/indiana/hamilton-county/municipalities/carmel"
bounds: [-86.20, 39.93, -86.03, 40.04]
submittal_checklist:
  - id: "swppp"
    label: "SWPPP per IDEM Rule 5 (Rule 13 if MS4)"
    required: true
  - id: "drainage-report"
    label: "Drainage report per Carmel Stormwater Manual"
    required: true
stormwater_thresholds:
  disturbance_acres_trigger: 0.5
  water_quality_volume_in: 1.2
  manual_title: "Carmel Stormwater Technical Standards Manual"
sources:
  - title: "City of Carmel Engineering"
    url: "https://www.carmel.in.gov/department-services/engineering"
---

Carmel fixture — overrides the county's stormwater thresholds, inherits its
setbacks via cascade.
